# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

admin_listen = 0.0.0.0:8001
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000
database = postgres
pg_host = your_postgres_host
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = your_database_user
pg_password = your_database_password
pg_database = your_database_name
dns_resolver = your_dns_resolver
# Uncomment and set to enable SSL for the Admin API
# admin_listen = 0.0.0.0:8444 ssl_cert=/path/to/cert.pem ssl_cert_key=/path/to/cert_key.pem
